name: Bank of America Corporation Depositary shares each representing 1/1000th interest in a share of 4.250% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series QQ
summary: These are depositary shares representing interest in Bank of America Corporation's preferred stock. Bank of America is a global financial institution, serving individual consumers, small- and middle-market businesses, and large corporations with a full range of banking, investing, asset management, and other financial and risk management products and services. The headquarters is located in Charlotte, North Carolina.
